findings.title: Missing test for unreadable or absent worker log
findings.impact: The new command has a distinct failure path when `tail` cannot read the selected log file, but the added tests only cover successful tail output and argument validation. A regression that returns success, prints stale output, or drops the diagnostic when the log file is missing or unreadable would not be caught.
findings.fix: Add a unit test that mocks `subprocess.run` with a nonzero return code and stderr, then asserts `Command.run` returns `BaseCommand.FAILURE` and logs the failure message.
